name: Brownies a La Mode
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8-inch square, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish and set aside.
2. Sift together flour, sugar, cocoa, baking powder, and salt into the bowl of an electric mixer. Add remaining ingredients and beat until smooth.
3. Pour batter into the prepared baking dish. Heat uncovered in Microwave Oven for 6 minutes.
4. Test for doneness with a toothpick; if not done, return to Microwave Oven for an additional minute.
5. Allow to cool slightly and cut into squares for serving.
6. Place a scoop of vanilla ice cream on each serving.
